title: Perfectly Perfected
description: Performance enhancements & Various Quality of Life improvements to provide the ideal survival Minecraft experience
body:
Vast **performance boosts** with subtle **quality of life changes**, paired with **Iris** and **Distant Horizon** support to perfect the survival Minecraft experience without disrupting the Vanilla feel.

Some mods within this pack are not enabled by default due to user preferences and can be accessed within the mod menu.
